allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: try: obj = json.loads\(line.strip\(\)\) t = obj.get\(''type'', ''''\) if t == ''assistant'': for block in obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\): if block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''=== ASSISTANT TEXT ===''\) print\(block[''text''][:2000]\) elif block.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_use'': print\(''=== TOOL USE ===''\) print\(block.get\(''name''\)\) print\(json.dumps\(block.get\(''input'', {}\), indent=2\)[:1000]\) elif t == ''user'': content = obj.get\(''message'', {}\).get\(''content'', []\) if isinstance\(content, str\): print\(''=== USER ==='', content[:500]\) else: for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\): if block.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(''=== USER TEXT ==='', block[''text''][:500]\) elif block.get\(''type''\) == ''tool_result'': print\(''=== TOOL RESULT ==='', str\(block.get\(''content'', ''''\)\)[:500]\) except: pass ")
